name: Mirliton El Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1/2 lb Ground beef
2 tbsp Vegetable oil
1/2 cup Onion, chopped
1 tbsp Green bell pepper, chopped
2 cups Mirlitons, chopped (2 medium)
1 1/2 tsp Salt
1/2 tsp Black pepper
2 tbsp Butter or margarine
1 tbsp Parsley, chopped
1/4 cup Bread crumbs
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef in vegetable oil.
2. Add onion, green bell pepper, mirlitons, salt, and black pepper; cook slowly until well done (about 30 minutes).
3. Fill a buttered casserole dish with the mirliton mixture, mixing in parsley.
4. Top with bread crumbs and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
NOTE: Squash may be substituted for mirlitons.
